name: Chinese Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons roasted almonds, chopped and slivered
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the lettuce.
2. Mix shredded lettuce with cubed chicken, fried rice sticks, roasted sesame seeds, chopped and slivered roasted almonds in a large bowl.
3. Prepare the dressing by combining sugar, black pepper, salt, vinegar, peanut oil, and sesame oil in a small bowl until well mixed.
